title: angelica acutiloba var. lineariloba
intro: Angelica acutiloba var. lineariloba, also known as Japanese angelica or Dong quai, is a variety of the Angelica acutiloba plant, a type of flowering plant in the carrot family, native to East Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate blood circulation, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant and anti-inflammatory activities. The health benefits of Angelica acutiloba var. lineariloba include its potential to alleviate menstrual cramps, menopausal symptoms, and other gynecological issues, as well as its ability to support immune function and reduce fever. Angelica acutiloba var. lineariloba is commonly used in traditional Chinese medicine and can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, although its effectiveness and safety have not been extensively scientifically studied.
